title: 24 Pack Giant Gutter Hooks for Outdoor Lights, Extra Strong Large Christmas Light Clips Gutter Hangers Weatherproof for Hanging Outdoor String Icicle Curtain Fairy Lights (White)
features: GIANT SIZE FOR A SECURE FIT | Forget fiddly, flimsy clips. Our larger 6.7cm giant gutter hooks provide a rock-solid, stable hold on your guttering, giving you complete peace of mind all season.
EFFORTLESS TOOL-FREE INSTALLATION | Clip on and hang your festive lights in minutes without drills, It’s the ultimate hassle-free solution for your outdoor Christmas lights.

WEATHERPROOF & DURABLE | Made from robust, frost-proof plastic and upgraded extra strong construction to withstand the British winter. Our heavy-duty gutter hooks are fully weather-resistant, able to withstand wind, rain, and snow.

YOUR COMPLETE DECORATING KIT | This value pack of [14/24/32] is your essential kit for all outdoor displays, perfect for hanging Christmas light clips, fairy lights, and patio string lights along your roofline, porch, or guttering.
CLEVER DUAL-PURPOSE DESIGN | Engineered for a universal fit on most UK gutters. The other end features a secure channel that firmly locks in all types of string, icicle, and fairy lights.
description: Product Description For Ultimate Durability When your display needs to withstand the very worst of the British weather, you need a hook that won’t back down. This hook is our toughest, most resilient gaint gutter hook, engineered specifically for maximum durability. For those in windy, exposed locations or anyone who simply refuses to compromise on strength, this is your ultimate solution. Built to Endure: The 2.5mm Difference The power of the gutter hooks lies in its formidable 2.5mm thick construction. This extra thickness provides exceptional rigidity and a vice-like grip on your guttering. While it requires a firm, deliberate push to click into place, that effort is rewarded with an incredibly secure anchor point that’s built to resist strong winds and protect your investment in your lights. The Choice for Exposed Locations & Heavy Displays Made from a high-quality, durable plastic that is built to last. Perfect for hanging Christmas light clips, fairy lights, feston lights or patio string lights along your roofline, porch, or guttering. It’s also the premier choice for heavier or more valuable decorations, large bulb string lights, or dense foliage garlands. When failure is not an option, this gutter hooks is the only answer. Let the Wind Howl. Your Lights Are Safe. Install the Extra Strong hooks and relax with the absolute confidence that your display is locked down. Sleep soundly through winter gales, knowing your beautifully hung lights are not going anywhere. For ultimate peace of mind and a display. About us We specialise in finding the small, clever things that solve real household problems. In a world of endless choice, we focus on what truly works. We believe the right tool, no matter how small, makes all the difference. We’re passionate about discovering those thoughtfully designed, genuinely useful items that bring ease and quality to your everyday tasks and hobbies. BYSMAH Gaint Gutter Hooks Specifications: Size: 67*25*1.1MM, thickness 2.5mm Weight: 3.7g per hook Quantity: 14/24/32pcs Colour: White
